case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIZ CARLOS BORGES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIZ CARLOS BORGES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BORGES, LUIZ CARLOS $1,369.79 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,449.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,326.79 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES, LUIZ CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED DEC-21-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BORGES, LUIZ CARLOS
